title: Yggdrasil: Unified identity from LICHEN Ed25519 keys
description: Specify and implement unified identity derivation. Link-local IID is SHA-256(pubkey)[0:8] with U/L cleared. Native application address uses current yggdrasil-go AddrForKey directly over the raw 32-byte Ed25519 public key; no SHA-512 participates. The full /128 is stable across meshes and gateway changes.
design: Use current yggdrasil-go AddrForKey over the raw 32-byte Ed25519 public key: complement key bits, encode leading-one count, remove that prefix and following zero, then pack/truncate into native 0200::/8 /128. No SHA-512 participates in native address derivation. LICHEN link-local IID remains SHA-256(pubkey)[0:8] with U/L cleared. Choose per-node native /128; reject gateway 0300::/8 subnet identity because it changes with the gateway.
acceptance_criteria: Normative derivation matches pinned upstream vectors; full native address is recomputed after key authentication; collisions become ambiguous and never silently replace TOFU bindings; key rotation creates a new native /128; implementation work uses canonical vectors.
